feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Identity Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Identity Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: loginmethod PWD and SSO in SCIM API version 2
entry.content:
Hi Eperts,

We had below code for loginmethod in SCIM APi version 1:

"targetPath": "$.userType",
"condition": "$.loginMethod == 'PWD'",
"constant": "partner"
},
{
"targetPath": "$.userType",
"condition": "$.loginMethod == 'SSO'",
"constant": "employee"
},
{
"targetPath": "$.userType",
"condition": "$.loginMethod == ''",
"constant": "employee"

How to add the loginmethod like this in SCIM API version 2? Please advise.

Thanks,

entry.title: IAS as proxy
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured SAP IAS as a proxy to Azure AD.

The groups from Azure AD (Groups Claim) are mapped to SAP BTP under "Role Collections" -> "User Groups"->Object ID from Azure Group.

However, how can I map or synchronize the groups that I have created in IAS to SAP BTP?

Is it to recommended to map  the groups from Azure to IAS ?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: User creation failed due to validation error
entry.content:
Hello All,

While creating user from IDM to Domino for 3-4 users we are getting "Failed due to validation error".
Domino Team said its issue from IDM end.

Please guide me what can be the possible reason for getting this error and how can I resolve it.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: SAP IDM/SAC Support for SAC roles and TEAM liaison in IDM
entry.content:
Hello,

We just connected IDM to SAC via IPS.

We are able to create users in ISC from IDM and assign them TEAMS.

However, when assigning a user to a TEAM, this removes the connection between the TEAM and its SAC roles.

I read that it was necessary in the api to return the roles of the Team but we did not find a solution to recover this and how to send it back to SAC.

https://www.ibsolution.com/academy/blog_en/sap-cyber-security/seven-challenges-in-connecting-sac-to-sap-ips

Has anyone ever encountered this problem? 

if yes what was your solution?

Regards

Michael

entry.title: Authentication error while connecting to Domino from IDM
entry.content:
Hi All,

Needed your guidance for below two case.

-->  I'm getting below error while connecting to Domino from IDM Test env.

(LDAP error: The supplied credential is invalid)
Explanation: [LDAP: error code 49 - Failed, invalid credentials for "UserID"] - javax.naming.AuthenticationException: [LDAP: error code 49 - Failed, invalid credentials for "UserID"]

The password is correct in IDM, in logs also its fetching correct, I can able to access it via Jxplorer and can able to login into Domino which is installed in IDM Test Env with same credentials but still getting error while connecting by IDM workflow.

--> Getting "Restricted Operation on server" error while performing delete operation from IDM to Domino. Creation, Modification is working but deletion is troughing error.

As per Domino Team they have provided manager access to IDM Technical userID that has required access to perform this action. Still Can't able to find where the actual issue is.

Could you please provide assistance what can be possible mistake there can be in IDM/ Domino configuration or resolution for the issue.


Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Extract Data from File fetched from UI
entry.content:
Hi All,

From UI I can able to fetch the file and store it into a folder but in next step I'm facing little issue to fetch file from folder.
Using From ASCII pass I can achieve it but I need to make it dynamic so that in next action task it takes the file from same place where it had store in first action task.
I tried storing the path in job variable in action task 1 but couldn't able to fetch this variable data in action task 2.

Please assist.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Shadow user in BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

What are the possible methods for automatic user provisioning from SAP IAS to SAP BTP while "Create Shadow Users During Logon" option in SAP BTP is deactivated ?

Or do users need to be created manually in SAP BTP in that case?

Many thanks for every tip ?

 

Best Regards

entry.title: what is the standard page to display employee Username in SuccessFactors : IAS or Spotlight?
entry.content:
with the latest release of SuccessFactors H1 2024 (B2405) , we no longer able to display username in SuccessFactors new feature : Spotlight view & spotlight preview.

what is the expected "latest experience" page to display Employee username ?

is it SuccessFactors Public Profile view ? 

or

is it IAS Employee Profile view XXX.ondemand.com/ui/protected/profilemanagement ?

For your information: 

name format is enabled

Hide Username in the UI is Disabled 

i’ve only found a sap note that described the enabled value : 

If this feature is enabled, username won’t be displayed on the Global Header and the employee quickcard. You cannot run a username search or see username in the search results in the areas that have adopted People Search, which include the Global Header, Org Chart, People Profile, Change Audit Report, and others.

entry.title: putNextEntry failed storing SPML.SAPUSER
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm getting "putNextEntry failed storing SPML.SAPUSER" Error while  reprocessing the user failed privilege.
User account attribute is correctly set in IDM and as mentioned in 
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/unable-to-reprocess-the-failed-role/qaq-p/11322380#feedback-error 

the privilege is not orphan, could you please help where I'm missing to check.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: How to enable activation email in IAS for manual import from S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello IAM/IAS Gurus,

How can I enable the activation email to be sent to each newly created user (via a manual import) in IAS Tenant?  

I use the import job to create users in bulk in IAS.  The import file is created from the backend S/4HANA public cloud tenant.

While the users are getting created in the IAS tenant, no activation email is sent to them.

As a workaround, I am manually initiating an activation email in IAS.  This process is time-consuming and does not send the link for the backend S/4HANA public cloud tenant.

How can I ensure that when each time a mass user import is performed, the newly created users created will get an activation email, along with the url/link to the specific back-end S/4HANA public cloud tenant from which the import file was created?  The underlined requirement is key, as the import file could be created from multiple S/4HANA public tenants (eg: Starter, DEV or TEST).

Thank you in advance and best regards,

Shaji

entry.title: Problem in SAP IDM while running SFSF Delta load using last_modified_on filter
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We have IDM 8 SP4 version installed and want to integrate SuccessFactor(SF) Employee Central(EC) module where we are using CompoundEmployee SOAP API to retrieve user data. Good part is, while we do a full run(initial load), we are able to read users data from SF EC however we also have to setup delta read from SF EC.

While I was going thru many blogs and articles on CompoundEmployee, I found we should use last_modified_on filter/parameter from the last successful run that should give us information but unfortunately I'm unable to retrieve info. I have followed SAP Note - https://me.sap.com/notes/2784576/E

Here are the screenshot from IDM -

Table Entry of same user when ran full sync which shows that changes was made within 3 months to user's profile -

Regards,

Ravi Paul

entry.title: GRC Master User id Mapping
entry.content:
Hi All,

GRC 12, sp20

The Master user id mapping table in SPRO>GRC>Access Control is not getting filled up for ABAP connectors through repository sync job, even after maintaining them in 1055.

Please clarify for which type of connectors and how the above table can be filled up for ABAP connectors

Regards

entry.title: X.509 login in SAC
entry.content:
Hello all,

SAC has 2 options for Authentication:
1. SAP Cloud Identity (default)
2. SAML Single Sign-On (SSO)

The customer has a strict requirement to use X.509 login with digital signature cards.

Is there a way to do it using option 1. ?

If we use option 2. what product/service can we use as IP (identity provider)? Do we have to buy it seperateley?

Thanks a lot in advance!
Ilian

entry.title: SAP IdM has odd behaviour in REST API - replace does a delete and add
entry.content:
We are on 8.0.8.31-ORA-2023-09-07, database schema version 1815 and REST API Version IDMREST08_9-80000541.SAR, so all from end of 2023.

We have an own entry type named LOCATION and for this also a MXREF_LOCATION. From a form where end users enter the new validity of externals (P_LEAVE_DATE) the following is triggered. The event of MXREF_LOCATION, twice. Once for a delete, once for an add. For me it feels like using a {D}...|{A} which of course isnt possible using the REST API.

We are using the replace function which had no problems until recently, which is the odd thing. I can remeber that several weeks before this wasn't a problem. Only recent changes were the upgrade to newer Linux and DB versions (dont ask me which exactly).

Anyone got an idea or the same behaviour?

Note: I only could choose SAP SF locations, so I choose the first one. Using the board selection I cannot choose anything. Also something odd. This post might end up wrong. Please move it, I cannot select anything appropriate.

entry.title: SAP IDM Windows Server OS upgrade impact
entry.content:
Hi,

Hi,

We are running SAP IDM with version 8.0 SP08.

Windows Server OS version 2012

Database is Sybase.

The IDM version log file is attached.

We have IDM configured with full automated user lifecycle management (hire to retire) with SAP SF is our source system.

Now we wanted to upgrade our Windows Server OS 2012 to Windows Server OS 2019. 

As both are same windows OS, will it impact IDM configuration after upgradig OS to Windows 2019? We do not find any such information in SAP IDM documents. 

Please provide your feedback. We will perform the Windows Server OS upgrade first in IDM development by taking snapshot.

Appriciate your guidance 

 

Best Regards

Imran

entry.title: SAP IAS BP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have three subaccounts (dev, test, prod) in SAP BTP and want to connect them to SAP IAS/IPS (IAS as proxy and Azure as IdP)

As each customer typically has two IAS tenants (test and prod) and one IPS tenant, I am currently looking for best practices for effectively using IAS tenants.

What is the recommended approach?

  • Should the test IAS tenant be connected to two subaccounts (development and test), and the prod IAS tenant be connected to the production subaccount? Are there any technical restrictions?
  • In which subaccount (dev, test, prod) should IPS be implemented?
  • Or is it preferable to assign each IAS tenant to a single subaccount, resulting in a total of three IAS tenants?

 

I would appreciate any advice

Many Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP Identity Services logon against SAP ECC or S4 backend?
entry.content:
Howdy!

So I have a requirement to setup an external facing WorkZone (Cloud Fiori Launchpad) which houses a few Fiori apps that connect to our SAP ECC EHP8 system (soon to be S4).  My requirement is that when a user access our WorkZone the logon page should authenticate against our SAP ECC system instead of the default BTP Open ID provider.

I've scoured the web and believe to have come across a few posts that seem to alude to a solution but even then I'm not sure.  For example, I've read some blogs/documents about activating the SAML 2.0 service on SAP and hooking that up to BTP identity services.  I've walked through these steps but it won't work; even then, it just doesn't feel like the right approach.  I've considered user propagation as a potential solution but haven't tried to implement it as I'm not even sure I'm headed in the right direction.

If anyone has any experience here I'd greatly appreciate some validation or success stories.  Much appreciated!

entry.title: IAS as central user management system
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

If I understand correctly, it is recommended to use the IAS user store as the central user management system.

I have the following question for clarification:

I have configured Azure as the Idp and the IAS as a proxy. Using the IPS, the groups from Azure are provisioned to IAS. If I, for example, delete/modify a user in IAS, that user is re-provisioned to the IAS user store during the next IPS job. Or, for example, the users were still existing as shadow users in the BTP subaccounts, even though they were deleted in Azure AD

How is central user management in IAS configured?

Is this the recommended approach?

Many Thanks

entry.title: SAP IDM Intergrate several file
entry.content:
Hello,

we have an interface that sends to IDM several files in the same format.

Is there a solution to integrate all files through the same job?

Sincerely,

Michael

entry.title: SAP IDM privilige inheritance should ignore context of business role
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I try something, where I did not find a solution.

I have a business role with privileges for two repositories. Only one repository need an assignment context.

So is it possible, to assign the business role with a context and only one privilege inherit this context. The second privilege will be assigned to the user without context? Is there any possibility, to configure the link from privilege to role, to achieve this?

Why I want to this? When I assign the business role with different contexts the contextless privilege will be only one line in the mxi_link with the mcAssignedInheritCount > 1.

Thanks

SAP Identity Management
